heading: Survivors of certain Reserve and Guard members
label: 1061 Survivors of certain Reserve and Guard members
notes: Historical and Revision NotesSection is based on , , .Pub. L. 99–145, title III, § 30899 Stat. 618Nov. 8, 1985
amendments: Historical and Revision NotesSection is based on , , .Pub. L. 99–145, title III, § 30899 Stat. 618Nov. 8, 1985

children.heading: .—Benefits
children.label: a .—Benefits
children.text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe regulations to allow dependents of members of the uniformed services described in subsection (b) to use commissary and exchange stores on the same basis as dependents of members of the uniformed services who die while on active duty for a period of more than 30 days.
while on active duty, active duty for training, or inactive-duty training (regardless of the period of such duty); or
while traveling to or from the place at which the member was to perform, or has performed, active duty, active duty for training, or inactive-duty training (regardless of the period of such duty).
